name: FR 5 — Delete User Account (Soft Deactivate) — 50 Concurrent Deactivations
description: Validate the soft delete flow by deactivating users using PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id} with payload {"status":"deactivated"} under 50 concurrent users, ensuring performance targets are met and deactivated users do not appear in /users/active.
corresponding NFR: With 50 concurrent deactivations: Max Response Time ≤ 500 ms, Success Rate ≥ 98%, and Data Integrity: deactivated users must not appear in /users/active.
preconditions: Test users must exist and be in "active" status.
Users should not have pending transactions that prevent deletion.

metrics.target: Deactivated users must not appear in /users/active

notes: Defaults used only where INPUT did not specify: duration_s=300 and think time_s=[1,3]. Data integrity validation must confirm deactivated user IDs do not appear in /users/active (endpoint referenced by NFR).
